rulings.Case Title: SUSAN BERMAN VS. LESLIE BAHR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 28, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT LESLIE BAHR and 8-10 CARMEL STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION's Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs. Off Calendar, re-noticed for March 7, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER VILDERMAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 28, 2013, line 2. Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend to address all issues raised in Demurrer. Opposing party failed to comply with court order of February 4, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIU FAI CHOI VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 28, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised in demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. KEITH EDWARD WINEMILLER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 28, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT KEITH WINEMILLER's AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny. Defendant failed to show paragraph 2 of prayer is false, irrelevant or improper. Additionally complaint not based on 3 day notice to pay rent. = (501/REQ)
